channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 5 reasons to get Chase's Ink Business Preferred Credit Card
item.description: Plenty of benefits make Chase's Ink Business Preferred Credit Card worth considering, from a high welcome bonus to strong coverage for travel and car ...

item.title: Spirit Airlines launches new inflight trading cards
item.description: Spirit Airlines launched a new set of trading cards featuring its historic and current fleet and liveries. The new cards are only available on Spirit ...

item.title: TSA officers to work without pay as government (partially) shuts down again
item.description: Well, here we go again. Travelers heading to the airport face a new round of uncertainty after part of the federal government shut down.

item.title: Horseradish Pot Roast
item.description: This horseradish pot roast is pure comfort food with a flavorful twist. The beef cooks low and slow until fork-tender,…

item.title: Huge offer: Limited-time 40% transfer bonus from Chase to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club
item.description: Act now: Chase is offering a 40% limited-time transfer bonus to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club. Score business-class seats for just 21,000 points.

item.title: This iconic ski-in, ski-out points hotel in Colorado just refreshed its rooms. We took a look inside
item.description: Come with us inside the ski-in, ski-out Park Hyatt Beaver Creek as we check out its renovated rooms.

item.title: Airline Welcomes VIP Endangered Turtle Who Needed Hospital After it was Blown Off Course By Powerful Winter Storm
item.description: On 9 January, large parts of Europe were brought to a standstill as Storm Goretti, a powerful winter cyclone with 110 mph winds, swept into the region...

item.title: Best Alternatives to Google’s Android Operating System (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Whether you have privacy concerns or you just want to freely tinker, these are our favorite alternatives to stock Android.

item.title: Ring Kills Flock Safety Deal After Super Bowl Ad Uproar
item.description: Plus: Meta plans to add face recognition to its smart glasses, Jared Kushner named as part of whistleblower’s mysterious national security complaint, ...

item.title: Your Weekly Horoscope – ‘Free Will Astrology’ by Rob Brezsny

item.title: In a changed VC landscape, this exec is doubling down on overlooked founders
item.description: As much of Silicon Valley chases mega-rounds and buzzy AI deals, Stacy Brown-Philpot is running Cherryrock Capital like a throwback to venture capital...

item.title: Good News in History, February 14
item.description: 95 years ago today, the horror film Dracula starring Bela Lugosi was released. Adapted from the 1897 novel by Bram Stoker, it’s a tale of Count Dracul...

item.title: Hollywood isn’t happy about the new Seedance 2.0 video generator
item.description: Hollywood organizations are pushing back against a new AI video model called Seedance 2.0, which they say has quickly become a tool for “blatant” copy...

item.title: India doubles down on state-backed venture capital, approving $1.1B fund
item.description: India’s $1.1B fund-of-funds will invest through private VCs to support deep-tech and manufacturing startups.

item.title: Designer Kate Barton teams up with IBM and Fiducia AI for a NYFW presentation
item.description: Designer Kate Barton teams up with Fiducia AI and IBM for a NYFW presentation.

item.title: Best Apple Watch (2026): Series 11, SE 3, and Ultra 3
item.description: Should you splurge on the new Series 11, or will the SE 3 do? Let us help you figure out which version to get (and which to avoid).

item.title: Brits Travel to Town Called Lover to Send Valentine’s Day Cards From World’s Most Romantic Post Office

item.title: Here’s What It’s Like to Use H&R Block’s DIY Tax Service (2026)
item.description: Filing taxes is a pain. Here’s how H&R Block DIY performed against other services I tested.

item.title: ‘Clueless’ -inspired app Alta partners with brand Public School to start integrating styling tools into websites
item.description: This week, Alta unveiled its first integration collaboration, teaming up with Public School, a storied New York City brand.

item.title: Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.
